hypothesis: If a large language model (especially o4-mini) is prompted one-shot with a complex in-context example of a PROV-DM-compliant synthesis graph, then its collection rate and structural/parametric F1 on extracting synthesis procedures from materials papers will exceed those achieved with zero-shot prompting, simpler one-shot examples, and other tested models because the rich example constrains the schema and attribute mapping the model learns to follow.
